title: オークスの後に・欠落の女王

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Now that's the power of a true queen!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Of course it is. I am the number one Umamusume, you know.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I was never going to lose. I did it... I'm number
one...

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Awww! I wanted to see her race against Vodka!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Right?! I really wanted to see them battle it out!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I should be happy about making it to number
one, but I just feel unsatisfied!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Daiwa Scarlet is crowned Queen of the Oaks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, the race only affirms her sense that
she's missing something.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It might be time for her to finally confront her
rival.
